title: PlayerProfile
description: Tracks the HUMAN, not the character. Persists across all of a player's characters. Tendencies accumulate from tagged actions; crossing thresholds (see core rules playerAptitudes) grants aptitudes that modify every character this player runs.

tendencies.description: tendencyId -> running score. Incremented when actions carry matching intent tags; slow decay keeps it current-behavior-weighted. Core tendencies: strategic, physical, social, cerebral, carousing, risky, cautious, generous, ruthless.

aptitudes.description: Derived, recomputed after every update — never hand-edited.

history.description: Optional recent tag samples for debugging/insight UI.
